_comment: Template. Copy to agent_keys.json and add one entry per agent. Provision a new session first: `bun run agent:fabric` writes session + agentSecret to sdk/build/agent_fabric.json — copy those here under a fresh token. feeSourceSecret optional (falls back to VEIL_FEE_SECRET env). Alternatively set the whole map inline via env KAGE_AGENT_KEYS='{...}'.
